title: Cheems SMP
description: A clean, performance-focused Fabric 1.20.1 modpack built for the Cheems SMP server—optimized for smooth multiplayer, fast load times, and vanilla-ish gameplay.
body:
# Cheems SMP 3.3

**Cheems SMP 3.3 is the official modpack for the Cheemsburger SMP server.**  
It’s built on Fabric 1.20.1 and tuned for players who want a vanilla-faithful experience with major performance improvements and visual polish, especially in multiplayer.

---

## Why install this pack?

- Designed for maximum performance on both low-end and high-end systems  
- Optimized for multiplayer — runs stable with many players in one world  
- Includes modern client-side rendering enhancements  
- No content overhauls — gameplay stays close to vanilla Minecraft  
- Comes preconfigured. Just install and join

---

## Performance Mods

The pack includes a full suite of hand-picked optimization mods:

- **Sodium** – High-efficiency rendering engine for better framerates  
- **VMP (Very Many Players)** – Boosts server tick performance and scalability  
- **ImmediatelyFast** – Streamlined client rendering for smoother visuals  
- **LazyDFU** and **Fastload** – Faster game startup and improved performance  
- **Entity Culling**, **Lithium**, **FerriteCore**, **Hydrogen**, and others – Reduce lag and memory usage  

---

## Quality of Life & Visual Enhancements

These mods improve the look and feel of the game without altering gameplay:

- **Continuity** – Seamless glass and connected textures  
- **Player Animation Library** – Better, smoother animations  
- **MidnightLib** – Required backend support  
- Clean lighting, smoother block transitions, and minor interface tweaks

---

## Compatibility

- Minecraft version: **1.20.1**  
- Mod loader: **Fabric**  
- Fully supported by **Modrinth App** and **Prism Launcher**  
- Multiplayer safe and server-compatible

---

## Server Info

- **IP**: `mc.lilboiboi.com`  
- Join the **[Discord server](https://discord.gg/Vr2Cy4fkZm)** to request whitelist access and see announcements
